intent-to-aura.title: Cellular Bio-Electricity: From Intent to Aura

blocks.text: The <Term id='coherence'>quantum coherence</Term> observed in biological systems suggests a level of precision that transcends classical thermodynamics. This phenomenon, often termed <Term id='biophotons'>biophoton emission</Term>, is not merely a byproduct of metabolic activity but a fundamental communication channel within the <Term id='microtubules'>microtubules</Term> of living cells.

Every cognitive impulse begins as a localized fluctuation in the <Term id='neural-nebula'>neural nebula</Term>, a dense network of synaptic potential that precedes physical manifestation. This is the 'Intent' phase of the bio-electric journey.

As we delve deeper into the <Term id='bio-resonant-fields'>bio-resonant fields</Term>, we observe that the resonance patterns align with specific harmonic frequencies that regulate cellular growth. The interaction between these fields and external <Term id='electromagnetic-induction'>electromagnetic induction</Term> creates a complex dance of energy transfer.
The transition from internal potential to external 'Aura' requires a specific state of <Term id='coherence'>coherence</Term> across the entire bio-circuitry.
The final stage of this journey is the stabilization of the human biofield, creating a resonant boundary that interacts with the larger environmental matrix.
